text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this. After my wallet was stolen by
a black cat, I also messed up the time and place
of our training session.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I'm sorry. This was all my fault.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm the one who misheard the time! I'm sorry! I'm
really, really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No! Neither of you are to blame! This is the work
of...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The prophet Umastradamus! This must be the
terrible disaster she foretold!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really? Then... it wasn't my fault?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure... I didn't just screw up again?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I am certain! This is all a part of the prophecy!
